author: Man.Osm
title: A powerful organizational tool for educators
content: I use Evervideo to manage my library of educational documentaries and classroom resources. The ability to create and export M3U playlists is fantastic for curating content for different modules. The file manager inside the app makes it easy to keep everything tidy, and the clean, customizable interface is a pleasure to use. It’s a professional-grade tool for anyone in education.
